directory_structure: docs/ patterns/ p01/ cmd/ server/ main.go internal/ goroutine/ consumer.go dispatcher.go worker/ worker.go p02/ cmd/ api/ main.go manager/ main.go worker/ main.go internal/ rest/ consumer.go dispatcher.go p03/ cmd/ api/ main.go manager/ main.go worker/ main.go internal/ websocket/ consumer.go dispatcher.go p04/ cmd/ api/ main.go manager/ main.go worker/ main.go internal/ nats/ consumer.go dispatcher.go setup.go postgres/ store.go nginx/ shared/ api/ handlers.go server.go client/ manager.go contracts/ consumer.go manager.go producer.go events/ events.go memory.go nats.go executor/ executor.go manager/ manager.go models/ task.go sse/ client.go hub.go store/ memory.go store.go templates/ embed.go tests/ e2e/ helpers_test.go task_test.go load/ load.go
